mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = #{isDeleted}
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND id != #{excludeId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, name, role, dept_id, dept_name, dept_scope, phone, email, status, is_deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{role}, #{deptId}, #{deptName}, #{deptScope}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{status}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
